title: const ctxFileWritten = false hardcodes description-update guard; savePFD block is unreachable dead code and never writes lastUpdated
evidence: workflow.ts:1259 sets ctxFileWritten=false literal. Block at 1261-1331 is unreachable. Even if reached, only memorySequence/memoryNameHistory are updated (1302-1307), never lastUpdated. Only other lastUpdated writer is spec-folder/generate-description.ts:79 (create-time only).

title: Default planner-mode plan-only skips refreshGraphMetadata entirely; derived.last_save_at/status/source_docs never refresh under default save path
evidence: workflow.ts:1333 guards refreshGraphMetadata on shouldRunExplicitSaveFollowUps=options.plannerMode==='full-auto'. generate-context.ts:415 declares default plannerMode='plan-only'. /memory:save and generate-context.js --json both use plan-only by default. Refresh fires only on explicit --full-auto.

title: implementation-summary.md._memory.continuity has zero programmatic writers; maintenance is 100% manual hand-editing with no freshness validator
evidence: Grep _memory.continuity|continuity_freshness across scripts/ and mcp_server/ source returns zero programmatic writer hits. Only reads at spec-doc-structure.ts:513-555 (validator) and resume-ladder.ts:361-372 (resume). CLAUDE.md permits AI hand-edit but no automated stamp on canonical save. Extends Cluster B by a fourth surface.

title: OnIndexSkipReason → EnrichmentSkipReason lookup uses Record<string, …> not Record<OnIndexSkipReason, …>; future variant added to OnIndexSkipReason would silently coerce to graph_lifecycle_no_op
evidence: reasonMap at post-insert.ts:302 typed as Record<string, EnrichmentSkipReason>. OnIndexSkipReason declared at graph-lifecycle.ts:128-132 with 4 variants; reasonMap covers 3; onindex_exception handled via separate if. A 5th variant would return undefined and fall through to makeSkipped('graph_lifecycle_no_op'). Only concrete silent-swallow site found across 8 typed unions audited.

resolution: Cluster B infrastructure gap reaches FOUR canonical-save surfaces (not two). Beyond known description.json.lastUpdated (R4-P1-002) and checklist.md markers (R3-P2-002): (a) graph-metadata.json.derived.* fields only refresh on --full-auto saves per workflow.ts:1333 (R51-P1-002); (b) _memory.continuity frontmatter has zero programmatic writers anywhere (R51-P1-003); (c) existing savePerFolderDescription block in workflow.ts:1259 is unreachable dead code due to const ctxFileWritten = false stub (R51-P1-001).

Of 8 typed unions audited (SharedPayloadTrustState, OnIndexSkipReason, EnrichmentStepStatus, EnrichmentSkipReason, EnrichmentFailureReason, ConflictAbortStatus, HookStateLoadFailureReason, TriggerCategory), 7 are exhaustiveness-safe via TypeScript control-flow narrowing in switch-no-default patterns. One concrete site — post-insert.ts:302 Record<string, …> lookup — silently swallows unknown OnIndexSkipReason variants. R4-P2-002 correctly scoped at P2; no escalation warranted but post-insert.ts:302 deserves satisfies-clause tightening.

direction: dist/memory/generate-context.js differs from .ts source in a way that hides lastUpdated writer
reason: Line counts differ (647 src / 571 dist) but plannerMode='plan-only' default and shouldRunExplicitSaveFollowUps guard are preserved identically. Description-update code lives in workflow.ts/.js not generate-context.

direction: graph-metadata has a completeness_score field that drifts independently
reason: GraphMetadataDerived schema at graph-metadata-schema.ts:43 has no completeness_score field. Actual parity axes are last_save_at, status, source_docs. KQ brief mention was a false lead.

direction: folder-discovery.ts:682 reconstructPerFolderDescription is a latent save-path lastUpdated writer
reason: Only invoked during discovery-time schema-repair when file is missing or invalid (lines 476-497). Never runs on healthy canonical save. Not a save-path writer.
